name: NGHM 1 MT Pilot
description: Near-term pilot target of 1 million tonne per annum green hydrogen, testing domestic electrolyser manufacturing and early project delivery.

name: NGHM 5 MT by 2030
description: National Green Hydrogen Mission target of 5 million tonnes per annum by 2030.

name: NGHM 10 MT Ambitious
description: Ambitious stretch target of 10 million tonnes per annum by 2035, requiring accelerated electrolyser deployment and workforce scale-up.
